summary: An unofficial chord practice tool tailored for
home-page.remark: Chara (pronunciation: /ˈkɛərə/), β Canum Venaticorum, is the second-brightest star in the northern constellation of Canes Venatici.

adaptation.title: adapt
adaptation.lock-message: Load device layout and chords on Settings page to use the Adaptation page.

realization.title: realize
realization.lock-message: You need to have at least one chord passing the Adaptation phase to access the Realization page.

accumulation.title: accum
accumulation.lock-message: You need to have at least one chord passing the Realization phase to access the Accumulation page.

quick-setting.chord-stats: {count, plural, =0 {No loaded chords} one {1 loaded chord} other {{count} loaded chords}}

os-keyboard-layout-setting.open-reference-button-tooltip: open reference website for this layout

data-deletion-setting.device-layout-deleted: The loaded device layouts have been deleted.
data-deletion-setting.chords-deleted: All loaded chords have been deleted.

delete-device-layout-confirm-dialog.description: Are you sure to delete the loaded device layout?

delete-chords-confirm-dialog.description: Are you sure to delete all loaded chords?

visibility-setting.thumb-3-switch-help-button-aria-label: open help dialog for thumb 3 switch

thumb-3-switch-help-dialog.title: thumb 3 switch
thumb-3-switch-help-dialog.content: Master Forge doesn't have the thumb 3 switches as CharaChorder One, CharaChorder Two and CCU. If you use Master Forge, or you use CharaChorder One, CharaChorder Two or CCU but don't use the thumb 3 switches, you can uncheck this setting to hide them in the layout.

practice-set-size.label: practice set size
practice-set-size.hint: Number of chords to practice at the same time

min-reps-to-pass.label: min reps to pass
min-reps-to-pass.hint: Minimum number of practice for a chord required to pass the phase

min-speed-to-pass.label: min speed (ChPM) to pass
min-speed-to-pass.hint: Minimum entry speed for a chord required to pass the phase

chords-page.file-input-aria-label: file input for selecting a chord library file to load into this application

information-page.description: This website, Chara, is an unofficial chord practice tool designed for CharaChorder 3D input devices, including CharaChorder One, CharaChorder Two, CCU and Master Forge.

chords-page.title: chords page
description: At chords page, you can load and view your chord library, and check the practice statistics of each chord in each phase.
You can bookmark any chords, which make them have higher priority to enter the practice cycle.
You can block any chords, which would keep them out of the practice cycle.

practice-phases.title: practice phases

adaptation-page.title: adaptation page
adaptation-page.description: The adaptation page helps you get familiar with the finger action for each new chord using the visual guide.

realization-page.title: realization page
realization-page.description: The realization page helps you further memorize the connection with each chord and its finger action by showing the visual guide after a 5-second delay.

accumulation-page.title: accumulation page
accumulation-page.description: The accumulation page helps you review the chords you've learned.

description: These pages are designed around the CHARA cycle, a chord practice cycle I proposed.

description.text: You can find more details about the CHARA cycle in this blog post.

settings-page.title: settings page
settings-page.description: At the settings page, you can adjust various tool options, including device layout, chord library, OS keyboard layout, practice phase parameters, component visibility, UI language, etc.

disclaimers.title: disclaimers
description: This site is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with CharaChorder and Forge Keyboard. Their official websites can be found at
Your typing statistics and settings in this tool are kept and stored locally in the localStorage of your browser. They are not transmitted to any other place via this tool.
